docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,548.00 FILED BY ACTION CELLULAR  RENT A PHONE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BIANCO, BILL    MAILBOXES  ETC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
